gist.headline: Daily README Refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot updated the repository's front page with the latest news and community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recently added community apps.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's landing page fresh with the latest community creations and updates.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee and the robot monitor companion updating a digital billboard or a giant book. Since it's an automated bot updating the README, the robot is the perfect representation.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head and the tiny bee mascot painting a giant digital billboard with fresh pixelated text. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head and the tiny bee mascot painting a giant digital billboard with fresh pixelated text.
